note: smart_session(action="curate") failed with "r is not defined" — an internal JavaScript error. This prevents me from curating context between waves. I skipped it and continued, but accumulated context may cause issues later.
expected: Context curation should succeed, compacting the coordination ledger and trimming irrelevant messages from other sessions.
